_meta.description: Template kịch bản AI Concept — Tạo ảnh concept marketing cho sản phẩm, hỗ trợ 2 mode: Generate & Composite

template.title: AI Concept sản phẩm
template.description: ✨ Tạo ảnh concept marketing — quảng cáo, khuyến mãi, ra mắt sản phẩm

prompt_templates.generate: A stunning {{concept_theme_description}} marketing visual featuring {{product_description}}, {{color_mood_description}}, professional advertising photography, 8K, eye-catching composition, commercial quality, ready for social media, {{custom_detail}}
prompt_templates.composite: Create a {{concept_theme_description}} marketing concept around the product in the image. {{color_mood_description}} Add professional marketing elements and advertising-quality lighting. Keep the product clearly visible and as the main focal point. Ultra photorealistic, commercial quality. No artifacts. {{custom_detail}}

template.prompt_template: A stunning {{concept_theme_description}} marketing visual featuring {{product_description}}, {{color_mood_description}}, professional advertising photography, 8K, {{custom_detail}}
template.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, amateur, watermark, distorted product, ugly text, bad typography, cluttered layout, oversaturated, unrealistic lighting, cheap looking

form_fields.label: Chế độ tạo ảnh

options.label: Ghép ảnh thật
options.description: Upload ảnh sản phẩm → AI tạo concept marketing xung quanh

options.label: Tạo ảnh mới
options.description: Mô tả sản phẩm + chọn concept → AI tạo ảnh marketing hoàn toàn mới

form_fields.help: Ghép ảnh thật: dùng ảnh sản phẩm có sẵn → tạo concept xung quanh. Tạo ảnh mới: AI tự vẽ toàn bộ.

form_fields.label: Ảnh sản phẩm
form_fields.help: Upload ảnh sản phẩm. Nên dùng ảnh đã xóa nền hoặc nền trắng để kết quả tốt nhất.

form_fields.label: Mô tả sản phẩm
form_fields.placeholder: VD: son môi MAC đỏ, iPhone 16 Pro, bộ mỹ phẩm chăm sóc da...
form_fields.help: Mô tả ngắn gọn sản phẩm. Bắt buộc khi Tạo ảnh mới, tuỳ chọn khi Ghép ảnh.

form_fields.label: Chủ đề concept

options.label: Giảm giá / Sale
options.description: Flash sale, giảm giá sốc, khuyến mãi hot
options.prompt_hint: a bold eye-catching sale promotion concept with dynamic price tags, discount badges, burst elements, vibrant red and yellow accents, urgency-driven composition
options.prompt_hint_composite: Create a bold sale/discount promotion concept around the product. Add dynamic price tags, discount badges, burst elements, vibrant red and yellow accents. Urgency-driven layout

options.label: Cao cấp / Premium
options.description: Sang trọng, tối giản, luxury feel
options.prompt_hint: a premium luxury product showcase with dark elegant background, gold accents, subtle reflections, sophisticated minimalist composition, high-end advertising feel
options.prompt_hint_composite: Create a premium luxury concept around the product. Dark elegant background with gold accents, subtle reflections, sophisticated and high-end advertising feel

options.label: Mới ra mắt
options.description: Sản phẩm mới, công nghệ, đột phá
options.prompt_hint: a dramatic new product launch reveal with spotlight effect, particle burst, sleek futuristic elements, dark background with bright accent lighting, first impression impact
options.prompt_hint_composite: Create a dramatic new product launch reveal around the product. Spotlight effect, particle burst, sleek futuristic elements, dark background with bright accent lighting

options.label: Theo mùa / Lễ hội
options.prompt_hint: a festive seasonal themed concept with holiday decorations, warm sparkling lights, gift elements, celebration atmosphere, seasonal color palette
options.prompt_hint_composite: Create a festive seasonal concept around the product. Holiday decorations, warm sparkling lights, gift elements, celebration atmosphere

options.label: Lifestyle
options.description: Sản phẩm trong đời sống hàng ngày
options.prompt_hint: a warm lifestyle product scene in everyday setting, natural light, cozy atmosphere, authentic and relatable, aspirational daily use context
options.prompt_hint_composite: Create a warm lifestyle concept around the product. Everyday setting, natural light, cozy atmosphere, authentic and aspirational daily use context

options.label: Tối giản
options.description: Clean, hiện đại, less is more
options.prompt_hint: a clean minimalist product concept with ample white space, simple geometric elements, muted color palette, modern typography-friendly layout, Scandinavian design aesthetic
options.prompt_hint_composite: Create a clean minimalist concept around the product. Ample white space, simple geometric elements, muted colors, modern and Scandinavian design aesthetic

options.label: Nghệ thuật
options.prompt_hint: an artistic creative product concept with abstract paint splashes, bold colors, fine art composition, gallery-worthy aesthetic, creative and unique
options.prompt_hint_composite: Create an artistic creative concept around the product. Abstract paint splashes, bold colors, fine art composition, gallery-worthy aesthetic

options.label: Công nghệ
options.prompt_hint: a futuristic tech-themed product concept with holographic effects, neon glow, circuit board patterns, dark background, digital and innovative feel
options.prompt_hint_composite: Create a futuristic tech concept around the product. Holographic effects, neon glow, digital patterns, dark background, innovative and cutting-edge feel

form_fields.help: Chọn chủ đề concept marketing cho sản phẩm

form_fields.label: Tone màu

options.label: Tự động
options.description: AI chọn tone màu phù hợp

options.label: Warm / Ấm
options.description: Vàng, cam, đỏ — ấm áp, năng lượng
options.prompt_hint: warm color palette with golden, orange, and red tones, cozy warm lighting
options.prompt_hint_composite: Use warm color palette with golden, orange, and red tones. Cozy warm lighting

options.label: Cool / Mát
options.description: Xanh dương, tím, bạc — chuyên nghiệp
options.prompt_hint: cool color palette with blue, silver, and purple tones, crisp professional lighting
options.prompt_hint_composite: Use cool color palette with blue, silver, and purple tones. Crisp professional lighting

options.label: Rực rỡ
options.description: Sáng, đậm, bắt mắt — strong visual impact
options.prompt_hint: vibrant saturated colors, bold and eye-catching, high contrast, energetic and dynamic
options.prompt_hint_composite: Use vibrant saturated colors, bold and eye-catching, high contrast, energetic visual impact

options.label: Pastel
options.prompt_hint: soft pastel color palette, gentle and delicate, light pink, mint, lavender tones, dreamy atmosphere
options.prompt_hint_composite: Use soft pastel colors — gentle pink, mint, lavender tones. Dreamy and delicate atmosphere

options.label: Tối / Moody
options.prompt_hint: dark moody atmosphere, deep shadows, dramatic accent lighting, mysterious and sophisticated, noir aesthetic
options.prompt_hint_composite: Use dark moody atmosphere with deep shadows, dramatic accent lighting, mysterious and sophisticated feel

form_fields.help: Chọn tone màu tổng thể cho concept — hoặc để AI tự chọn

form_fields.label: Chi tiết thêm (tuỳ chọn)
form_fields.placeholder: VD: thêm chữ 'SALE 50%', nền gradient tím, hiệu ứng bokeh...

generation_logic._note: Quy tắc build prompt — phân nhánh theo creation_mode

common_steps.description: Đọc creation_mode từ form. Mặc định: composite

mode_generate._note: Tạo ảnh concept mới từ prompt — dùng flux-pro

mode_composite._note: Tạo concept quanh ảnh sản phẩm thật — dùng flux-kontext
